titleStmt.title: SII 9.619: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 619. (A.R. No. 437 of 1923.) ON A SLAB SET UP BEFORE THE TEMPLE OF HANUMAN AT BAGINAYAKANAHALLI, RAYADRUG TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka • • • • Parābhava, Chaitra, śu. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1546 March 12 Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Vīraṇa-Nāyaka, the agent to the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Viṭhalayadēva-Mahā-arasu, made a kaṭṭu-mānya grant of some fields to five persons for constructing the ruined tank in Bāginā[yakanahaḷḷi].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhdhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruśaṁga
ḷu neya parābhavasaṁvatsarada cayitra śu 10 lu śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsivadēvama
hārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgeyiUttiralāgi śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśva
ra rāmarāja viṭalayadēvamahāarasugaḷaĀyanavara kā
ryake ka yi vīraṇanāyakaru bāginā
ḷḷiya keṟe lasihōgi yiralāgi
kaṭuvadake māḍida vivara
giseṭi grāma sēnabōva yellamarā vinahaḷḷiya
nāgireḍi bāvi muddaṇagauḍa saha jana 5 ke koṭa kaṭṭiya ka
ṭṭumānyakaṁ nele Uttara purada hola mēre hoṁ
di kha . 1 gade kha . 1 keṟekeḷagaṇa gade kha 1 ke dasavaṁda Āgi
yiṣṭanu nīu Ayivaru niṁma putrapautrapāraṁpareyā
gi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi sukhadiṁ Anubhavisalu
ḷavaru yeṁdu koṭṭakeṟeya kaṭṭumānya dasavaṁdada
śāsanā yidake Āvanānūbba tappidaru taṁde tāya
koṁda pāpake hōharū .
Digital edition of SII 9.619 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
